# Login — Android Project (generated by RFBuilder)

This is a real, buildable Android Studio project. It wraps your web app
(HTML/CSS/JS from the "assets/www" folder) in a native WebView shell.

## Requirements
- Android Studio (or a JDK 17 + Android SDK + Gradle command-line setup)
- Android SDK Platform matching compileSdk (34) installed

## Build a real, signed debug APK
1. Open this folder in Android Studio, **or** from a terminal with the
   Android SDK on your PATH, run:
   ```
   ./gradlew assembleDebug
   ```
2. The output APK will be at:
   `app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`
3. For a release build (signed for the Play Store), configure a signing
   key in `app/build.gradle` and run `./gradlew assembleRelease`.

## What RFBuilder generated for you
- `app/src/main/assets/www/` — your exported HTML/CSS/JS/assets
- `MainActivity.java` — loads `file:///android_asset/www/index.html` in a WebView
- `AndroidManifest.xml`, `build.gradle`, `settings.gradle` — a minimal, working Gradle project
